{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":27},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7595604030124213016","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"总体而言，整本书感情细腻，案件故事也不错。不过从第一人称视角看案件，加上大篇幅对“我”情绪的描述，跟以往的刑侦类有了较大的区别。作者对双相的病情描述，用笔较多，看到后面，略有反感，总觉得用词相似度太高了。也许是这病本身就是这么简单的反复而已。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768491935,"group_id":"7548366074085919769","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzFI0V4at0ohlgKtFkfSaBc1CQGCfe3dusx+M/UyW5/H","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2066713607408333","user_name":"喜欢鲣鸟的方雪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2066713607408333","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7548366074085919769","book_info":{"abstract":"【在这个颠倒的城市中，有人像疯子一样追求真相！】
这座城市病了，脱下警服的刑警大队队长何言也病了。因师父去世愤然离开警队，又接连遭遇母亲去世，患上躁郁症导致家庭破裂，何言的人生彻底陷入了低谷。在发小的提议下，何言与其成立咨询公司，将丰富的刑侦经验、躁郁症带来的复杂情绪全部投入调查工作。何言本以为自己这辈子就会这样过下去，却在调查中卷入了一系列复杂的案件：冒名顶替、交换杀人、直播求救……每一个看似偶然的背后都是犯罪者的疯狂，何言赌上残存的理智，在躁郁症与破碎人生的夹缝中点燃最后一盏希望之灯。真相为何？迷雾终散！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/0376a037b2f0582dce53820d08f0e889~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"空城","author_id":"","book_id":"7548366074085919769","book_name":"疯探","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#082038","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"1.3万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":165,"name":"悬疑推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=165&name=悬疑推理&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7548366150267046974","read_count":"1429","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"465296"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"94","tags":"精品小说,悬疑推理","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0376a037b2f0582dce53820d08f0e889~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779257491&x-signature=o9wZMxNtq8FbHgiSUpZJX8uRMmU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"139"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读24小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":70659,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":86965,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":202},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7580664617154446104","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"虽然只看到三十的章，开头淡淡的幽忧到精神的情绪表达很明显，真的很喜欢作者的描写，因为上本重组，爱上了作者的情绪，心理，述事描写，真的很舒适，期待后续"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765014318,"group_id":"7548366074085919769","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6IyoyB8ugxIJ72qH1SOD8GEbJbDXzrAe+oRzVQITuS+","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1ae3c01de16f45b0be8f6b91d0de1747~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776623954&x-signature=015xNN0d5CXBpjN1dwQ3QJjrQLg%3D","user_id":"1515581054389118","user_name":"哟哟哟切克闹耶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1515581054389118","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7548366074085919769","book_info":{"abstract":"【在这个颠倒的城市中，有人像疯子一样追求真相！】

这座城市病了，脱下警服的刑警大队队长何言也病了。因师父去世愤然离开警队，又接连遭遇母亲去世，患上躁郁症导致家庭破裂，何言的人生彻底陷入了低谷。在发小的提议下，何言与其成立咨询公司，将丰富的刑侦经验、躁郁症带来的复杂情绪全部投入调查工作。何言本以为自己这辈子就会这样过下去，却在调查中卷入了一系列复杂的案件：冒名顶替、交换杀人、直播求救……每一个看似偶然的背后都是犯罪者的疯狂，何言赌上残存的理智，在躁郁症与破碎人生的夹缝中点燃最后一盏希望之灯。真相为何？迷雾终散！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/0376a037b2f0582dce53820d08f0e889~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"空城","author_id":"","book_id":"7548366074085919769","book_name":"疯探","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#082038","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"1.3万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":165,"name":"悬疑推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=165&name=悬疑推理&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7548366150267046974","read_count":"1429","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"465296"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"94","tags":"精品小说,悬疑推理","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0376a037b2f0582dce53820d08f0e889~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779257491&x-signature=o9wZMxNtq8FbHgiSUpZJX8uRMmU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"85"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读17小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":59715,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":62791,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":101},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7598099228616196888","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看完好多天了  今天才反评   作者的另一部也看完了  都很好看   可能有些人不喜欢这种写作风格   但我很喜欢   把心理活动写的很细   就是这本写的案子都很琐碎   而且随着主角的视角很缓慢的进行  哦  对  这本是第一人称视角   第一次看感觉还可以   一个有着双向情感障碍的大叔   努力治病并破一些案子的故事   最后也跟前妻复合了   
里面还出现了上一部主角的女儿   很喜欢这种联动   啤酒吧老板跟那个喜欢听音乐的作家   作为主角的朋友  一个向阳  一个向暗   就像主角心理的善恶  走向不同结局   强推！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769074501,"group_id":"7548366074085919769","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"主受   双强   双洁   慢热  把配角当人  刑侦","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzGsZDnRY7m0zkSCdbTPYjWTbm4VNQ7Wmto4mJXegRYH","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ea1883b20d8247d7919479d963eee98a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776615718&x-signature=5wY8K6vNhnlRyvBzJAjYL5LplgU%3D","user_id":"3342146519962200","user_name":"背暧觉昧迷＆"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3342146519962200","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7548366074085919769","book_info":{"abstract":"【在这个颠倒的城市中，有人像疯子一样追求真相！】

_timestamp":1769748313,"group_id":"7548366074085919769","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"橘猫真的很重

这座城市病了，脱下警服的刑警大队队长何言也病了。因师父去世愤然离开警队，又接连遭遇母亲去世，患上躁郁症导致家庭破裂，何言的人生彻底陷入了低谷。在发小的提议下，何言与其成立咨询公司，将丰富的刑侦经验、躁郁症带来的复杂情绪全部投入调查工作。何言本以为自己这辈子就会这样过下去，却在调查中卷入了一系列复杂的案件：冒名顶替、交换杀人、直播求救……每一个看似偶然的背后都是犯罪者的疯狂，何言赌上残存的理智，在躁郁症与破碎人生的夹缝中点燃最后一盏希望之灯。真相为何？迷雾终散！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/0376a037b2f0582dce53820d08f0e889~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"空城","author_id":"","book_id":"7548366074085919769","book_name":"疯探","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#082038","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"1.3万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":165,"name":"悬疑推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=165&name=悬疑推理&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7548366150267046974","read_count":"1429","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"465296"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"94","tags":"精品小说,悬疑推理","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0376a037b2f0582dce53820d08f0e889~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779257491&x-signature=o9wZMxNtq8FbHgiSUpZJX8uRMmU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"170"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读29小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":101394,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":104856,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":102},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7570620209295164222","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"对比第一本重案三人组的案子，这本的案子给我一种没有结尾，点到为止，一声叹息的感觉。填了第一部的疑惑还有联动，最后是he真好，每部的男主都惨惨的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762675991,"group_id":"7548366074085919769","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9FZqSp5gAwT4D9DtsocoRiBmXSOLfCFaUhMP4XYe8IW","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b8324b2a10e44e27b6e23e28045a0709~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776622578&x-signature=BOuL8fpq%2B%2B6K2tVPuDTbXkY2rbs%3D","user_id":"1552926943480702","user_name":"爱吃炒土鱿的薛常年"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1552926943480702","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1731833178,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7548366074085919769","book_info":{"abstract":"【在这个颠倒的城市中，有人像疯子一样追求真相！】
这座城市病了，脱下警服的刑警大队队长何言也病了。因师父去世愤然离开警队，又接连遭遇母亲去世，患上躁郁症导致家庭破裂，何言的人生彻底陷入了低谷。在发小的提议下，何言与其成立咨询公司，将丰富的刑侦经验、躁郁症带来的复杂情绪全部投入调查工作。何言本以为自己这辈子就会这样过下去，却在调查中卷入了一系列复杂的案件：冒名顶替、交换杀人、直播求救……每一个看似偶然的背后都是犯罪者的疯狂，何言赌上残存的理智，在躁郁症与破碎人生的夹缝中点燃最后一盏希望之灯。真相为何？迷雾终散！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/0376a037b2f0582dce53820d08f0e889~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"空城","author_id":"","book_id":"7548366074085919769","book_name":"疯探","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#082038","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"1.3万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":165,"name":"悬疑推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=165&name=悬疑推理&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7548366150267046974","read_count":"1429","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"465296"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"94","tags":"精品小说,悬疑推理","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0376a037b2f0582dce53820d08f0e889~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779257491&x-signature=o9wZMxNtq8FbHgiSUpZJX8uRMmU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"101"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":17696,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1360},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7573499156464337689","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"大概是第一人称的原因，这本比上一本的文笔更加细腻，作者对抑郁症了解颇深，不知道是相关专业人士还是久病成医，可惜最后黑警案写的稍显敷衍，大概作者对于组织犯罪案件笔力还是不足，所以以一个参与其中的侦探用管中窥豹的方式得以呈现。这也是这个作者最大的优点，踏实，没有强行反转，不故弄玄虚，是现在写悬疑小说少见的优秀作者"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763345272,"group_id":"7548366074085919769","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/MAWmZUqr4CXCknvAwTd6U=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776614448&x-signature=9AK6tJoPatlC5h8wRFq%2F%2FD9Y0TE%3D","user_id":"109756332611","user_name":"从未使用"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"109756332611","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7548366074085919769","book_info":{"abstract":"【在这个颠倒的城市中，有人像疯子一样追求真相！】

无可忍接连弃读了两本小说，这本小说没让我失望"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769051698,"group_id":"7548366074085919769","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N36mEOHHUVEkOCmgnRCboNYRwK90jpyxuy/+y6mJzBxq","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776617805&x-signature=tKjbkp0JAbrDpUCor58zq965eto%3D","user_id":"3271801109220813","user_name":"皇天之城的小梵"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3271801109220813","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7548366074085919769","book_info":{"abstract":"【在这个颠倒的城市中，有人像疯子一样追求真相！】
这座城市病了，脱下警服的刑警大队队长何言也病了。因师父去世愤然离开警队，又接连遭遇母亲去世，患上躁郁症导致家庭破裂，何言的人生彻底陷入了低谷。在发小的提议下，何言与其成立咨询公司，将丰富的刑侦经验、躁郁症带来的复杂情绪全部投入调查工作。何言本以为自己这辈子就会这样过下去，却在调查中卷入了一系列复杂的案件：冒名顶替、交换杀人、直播求救……每一个看似偶然的背后都是犯罪者的疯狂，何言赌上残存的理智，在躁郁症与破碎人生的夹缝中点燃最后一盏希望之灯。真相为何？迷雾终散！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/0376a037b2f0582dce53820d08f0e889~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"空城","author_id":"","book_id":"7548366074085919769","book_name":"疯探","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#082038","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"1.3万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":165,"name":"悬疑推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=165&name=悬疑推理&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7548366150267046974","read_count":"1429","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"465296"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"94","tags":"精品小说,悬疑推理","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0376a037b2f0582dce53820d08f0e889~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779257491&x-signature=o9wZMxNtq8FbHgiSUpZJX8uRMmU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"34"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":14929,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":19892,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":169},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7570566831259747097","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太太太细腻了描写的，焦虑，抑郁，狂躁，逃避，想自己呆着，这些心理描写真实，案件写的也很好……倒叙，插叙，都很自然……作者功底深厚！只有两篇！加油作者！期待！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762661933,"group_id":"7548366074085919769","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5t2Fp43LV5TaLBV+FL/No4jyxjqc8pqyYi8aJGsZrvL","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1011191109399422","user_name":"旁观者660421"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1011191109399422","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7548366074085919769","book_info":{"abstract":"【在这个颠倒的城市中，有人像疯子一样追求真相！】
